title: Fix Off By One
description: Return sum of integers from 1 through n inclusive. The starter uses a wrong range.

hint_plan.level_1: You want 1 + 2 + … + n, but the loop adds 0 + 1 + … + (n - 1).
hint_plan.level_2: `range(n)` runs `n` times starting at 0; it never includes `n` as a value to add.
hint_plan.level_3: Loop over `range(1, n + 1)` or change what you add each step.
hint_plan.level_4: Trace with n=5: current code sums 0..4, not 1..5.
